visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and light makeup waves at the camera in a room with a clothing rack behind her. (2) She holds a light blue bottle of TAG Correcting Sun Base close to the camera, showcasing the branding and liquid. (3) The scene shifts to her in a retail store (Daiso), wearing a white beanie and a beige cardigan, placing items into a red shopping basket. (4) Back in the indoor setting, she applies the makeup base to her cheek using a triangular sponge, then holds up PUFFEE brand puffs in their packaging. (5) She demonstrates the different puffs on her arm and face, showing the texture and finish. (6) She introduces THE BOM eyeliner pencils, showing three different colors, then applies a pinkish one to her lower eyelid. (7) A close-up shows her applying a TAG eyebrow pencil to her brow, then she displays Son&Park lip balm jars. (8) She applies the lip balm to her cheeks and lips, followed by a demonstration of TAG lipsticks. (9) The video shows her walking through a Daiso store with a full basket, and ends with a collection of all featured products laid out on a table.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天呢. [Logo]: 韓國大創. (2) [Slogan]: 美妝好物. (3) [Logo]: TAG 妝前矯正. [Subtitle]: 妝前矯正. (4) [Logo]: PUFFEE 粉撲. [Subtitle]: 如果你喜歡霧面妝感的話. (5) [Variety]: 一個20塊. [Variety]: (也太便宜!!!). (6) [Logo]: THE BOM 眼線臥蠶筆. [Subtitle]: 推薦 x3. (7) [Slogan]: 沒有業配!!!. (8) [Variety]: 沒事 不會斷. (9) [Logo]: TAG 眉筆. [Subtitle]: 我買3號. (10) [Logo]: Son&Park 唇頰霜. [Subtitle]: 01號. (11) [Logo]: TAG 唇膏. (12) [Slogan]: \老樣子/ 趕快截圖下來.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a black sweatshirt in the indoor setup and a beige cardigan with a white beanie in the store footage.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic room with a gold-colored clothing rack and various items of apparel hanging. A Daiso retail store interior with bright shelves stocked with cosmetics and stationery.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music with a steady kick drum begins. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and rapid delivery. (2) A 'Ding' SFX triggers as the first product is mentioned, with the vocal pitch rising further. (3) Subtle rustling of a shopping basket is heard momentarily beneath the music as the voice describes the store experience. (4) A 'Pop' SFX sounds during the transition to the powder puff review. (5) The speaker's volume increases slightly when highlighting the price of the products. (6) A sharp 'Click' SFX occurs as the eyebrow pencil is demonstrated. (7) The BGM continues with a consistent major-mode progression throughout the lip balm section. (8) The vocal track concludes with a friendly, inviting tone, followed by a final musical fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Store Footage -> Item-by-item demonstration -> Summary -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend and review a variety of affordable cosmetic products found at Daiso Korea, using a personal haul and demonstration format to appeal to budget-conscious beauty fans.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator displays specific brands (TAG, PUFFEE, THE BOM) and demonstrates their usage while praising their value, though she claims 'no endorsement' in the text.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media editing style with colorful captions and frequent cuts to keep viewers engaged with a large number of products in a short time.
